hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
result=False
intercity_transport_go=''
intercity_transport_back=''
if allactivities(plan)[0]['type'] != "airplane" and intercity_transport_origin(allactivities(plan)[0])==start_city(plan) and allactivities(plan)[-1]['type'] != "airplane" and intercity_transport_origin(allactivities(plan)[-1])==target_city(plan):
  result=True
result_list.append(result)
inter_city_transportation_cost=0
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity) in ['airplane','train']: inter_city_transportation_cost+=activity_cost(activity)
result=inter_city_transportation_cost<=5900
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language:
我们4人，从杭州出发，到北京旅行4天，要求满足以下任意一个：
1. 不希望乘坐airplane前往目的地，不希望乘坐airplane返回
2. 跨城市交通的预算为5900.0
